name: Suspicious DLL or VBS File Creation in ProgramData
description: The creation of a .dll or .vbs file in the ProgramData folder has been detected, which is a technique commonly used by malware like Bumblebee for execution and persistence.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp when the file was created.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID (expected to be 11).

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the file was created.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The name of the computer where the event occurred.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path of the process that created the file.

parameters.name: TargetFilename
parameters.description: The full path of the .dll or .vbs file created.

parameters.name: Hashes
parameters.description: The hashes of the created file (if available in the logs).
